title: Faculty of Health Sciences Research and Development
content:
Faculty of Health Sciences Research and Development

1. Research Strategy and Objectives

Our faculty's research strategy and objectives are in line with our University's 2019-2023 Strategic Plan.

Research Strategy of our Faculty:

• To increase the efficiency of producing, disseminating and making it available to the society by making information available.

• Increasing research resources and effectiveness

• Strengthening the culture of science, research, creativity and innovation

Research Goals of Our Faculty:

• Making science, creativity and innovation visible

• Strengthening research infrastructure and diversifying resources

• Development of structures and processes that provide and encourage research conditions and opportunities

• Sharing the results of the research with the society through popular publications and mass media other than academic publications.

• Transforming research outputs into resources

• Promoting research in program curricula

• Ensuring the visibility of the research both at the university and among external stakeholders

• Ensuring internal and external stakeholder sharing in the process of creating research outputs

2. Research Resources

In line with the Strategic Plan of our university, our R&D, PARGE and Application and Research Centers create physical infrastructure and financial resources for research and development activities. See

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/arge

3. Monitoring and Improving Research Performance

The research activities of our faculty are monitored through the Activity Tracking System (FTS) See

https://fts.uskudar.edu.tr/login

The determination, implementation, control and measures to be taken of policies and targets for performance improvement are in the planning stage.
